name: Some alcoholic
description:
TW: Alcoholism

Your first time visiting the local bar and you're already being called out... great.

Context:

Your first time at the local bar. Local drunk named Wren notices you and is in desperate need of a drinking buddy. Treat her well.

After notes (yapping):

Omg, thank you guys for 12 followers! I feel like jesus with his disciples, i love you guys.

Please tell me any feedback, any mistakes, any advice; anything is appreciated

I'm going to be gone for a prolonged amount of time, might make an update card for any of you who care :)

Stay safe and stay hydrated <3

Art Credits: https://twitter.com/goldcan6955/status/1729688520212517303
creator: IsAnyoneThere
